creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
I cannot run Double Commander after the latest pkg upgrade of my desktop based on FreeBSD 13.3 amd64 and KDE5 / QT5:

% doublecmd 
SystemLocale en_US
SystemLanguage en
SystemEncoding UTF-8
DefaultSystemCodePage 65001
DefaultFileSystemCodePage 65001
DefaultRTLFileSystemCodePage 65001
Qt: Session management error: None of the authentication protocols specified are supported
Starting GuiMessageQueue
Starting Double Commander
Double Commander 1.1.15 gamma
Revision: Unknown
Commit: Unknown
Build: 2024/06/26
Lazarus: 3.4.0.0
Free Pascal: 3.2.3
Platform: x86_64-FreeBSD-qt5
System: FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE-p3
Desktop Environment: KDE
Widgetset library: Qt 5.15.14, libQt5Pas 5.6.1
This program is free software released under terms of GNU GPL 2
Copyright (C) 2006-2024 Alexander Koblov
   and contributors (see about dialog)
Executable directory: 
Configuration directory: /usr/home/user/.config/doublecmd
Global configuration directory: settings/
Loading configuration from /usr/home/user/.config/doublecmd/
PollThread: Start polling
PollThread: AddPoll 27
Creating PixmapManager
Loading icon theme Oxygen
Loading icon theme Hicolor
Theme dctheme not found.
[FORMS.PP] ExceptionOccurred 
  Sender=EAccessViolation
  Exception=Access violation
  Stack trace:
  $0000000000449B9B
  $0000000000518413
  $000000000051B205
  $000000000051D5FA
Finishing GuiMessageQueue
PollThread: RemovePoll 27
PollThread: Finish polling
Shutting down PixmapManager
Warning: Skip libKF5IconThemes exit handler
Exit 217

I also tried to deinstall doublecmd-qt5 and install doublecmd-qt6, but i failed with the same error:

% doublecmd
SystemLocale en_US
SystemLanguage en
SystemEncoding UTF-8
DefaultSystemCodePage 65001
DefaultFileSystemCodePage 65001
DefaultRTLFileSystemCodePage 65001
Qt: Session management error: None of the authentication protocols specified are supported
Starting GuiMessageQueue
Starting Double Commander
Double Commander 1.1.15 gamma

Commit: Unknown
Build: 2024/06/26
Lazarus: 3.4.0.0
Free Pascal: 3.2.3
Platform: x86_64-FreeBSD-qt6
System: FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE-p3
Desktop Environment: KDE
Widgetset library: Qt 6.7.2, libQt6Pas 6.2.1
This program is free software released under terms of GNU GPL 2
Copyright (C) 2006-2024 Alexander Koblov
   and contributors (see about dialog)
Executable directory:
Configuration directory: /usr/home/user/.config/doublecmd
Global configuration directory: settings/
Loading configuration from /usr/home/user/.config/doublecmd/
PollThread: Start polling
PollThread: AddPoll 13
Creating PixmapManager
Loading icon theme Oxygen
Loading icon theme Hicolor
Theme dctheme not found.
[FORMS.PP] ExceptionOccurred
  Sender=EAccessViolation
  Exception=Access violation
  Stack trace:
  $00000000004496DB
  $0000000000517E93
  $000000000051AC85
  $000000000051D07A
Finishing GuiMessageQueue

PollThread: Finish polling
Shutting down PixmapManager
